findings.suggestion: Add JWT verification (jwt.verify) to validate tokens

findings.description: eval() usage detected - code injection risk
findings.suggestion: Avoid eval(). Use JSON.parse() for JSON, or safer alternatives

findings.description: eval() usage detected - code injection risk
findings.suggestion: Avoid eval(). Use JSON.parse() for JSON, or safer alternatives

findings.suggestion: Use Prisma findMany with where.in, or batch operations

findings.description: Users service uses in-memory Map store - data lost on restart
findings.suggestion: Use a persistent database (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) for production

findings.description: User service does not hash passwords
findings.suggestion: Use bcrypt or argon2 to hash passwords before storage

findings.description: Math.random() used for token/secret generation - not cryptographically secure
findings.suggestion: Use crypto.randomBytes() or crypto.randomUUID() for security-sensitive random values

findings.description: Token generation uses Math.random() - not cryptographically secure
findings.suggestion: Use crypto.randomBytes() for secure token generation

findings.description: HTTP request with user-controlled URL - SSRF risk
findings.suggestion: Validate URLs against allowlist, block internal IP ranges

findings.description: Server listening on port 80 without HTTPS redirect
findings.suggestion: Add HTTPS redirect or configure SSL/TLS

findings.description: Grafana exposed without authentication at nginx level
findings.suggestion: Add auth_basic or IP restriction to Grafana location

findings.description: Prometheus exposed without authentication at nginx level
findings.suggestion: Add auth_basic or IP restriction to Prometheus location

findings.description: Jaeger UI exposed without authentication at nginx level
findings.suggestion: Add auth_basic or IP restriction to Jaeger location

findings.description: Error silently swallowed - no logging or handling
findings.suggestion: Log errors or rethrow them; never silently catch

findings.description: setInterval without corresponding clearInterval - memory leak risk
findings.suggestion: Store interval ID and clear it on module destroy or component unmount

findings.description: Health check has no actual health indicators configured
findings.suggestion: Add database, Redis, and other service health checks

findings.description: Prometheus metrics endpoint exposed without authentication
findings.suggestion: Add authentication or IP restriction to /metrics endpoint
Wrap $connect() in try/catch to handle connection failures

findings.description: Queue service methods accept "any" type - no input validation
findings.suggestion: Define proper interfaces for queue job data

findings.description: Synchronous file system operation blocks event loop
findings.suggestion: Use async fs.promises API instead of sync operations
